What I get, as events are unfolding since Alma’s insights and teachings give us a key to read them, is that things are deviating dramatically from the plan that would have allowed our countries to live in prosperity, no fake growth but real and steady without excessive. But in the middle there’s UE and his lobby( globalist) that run the western world basically since this exists as we know it and even before. What they are doing around the UE countries is very clear, only their media can still hide it, they are boycotting at very high level the people’s voices and people’s willing and freedom. Right wing are growing, and this is people choices, not political influences from my words, just facts. So we can like it or not, this is the reality. By the way, to me the pattern is very clear and also their tool to pursue their boycott plan.
-France: Marine le pen, BANNED
-USA: Trump, “fascist” (one assassination attempt)
-Romanian presidents Georgescu, SHUT DOWN 
And I could go on and on.
Globalist are collapsing and clearly loosing grip on controlling people ideas, and so they are tightening the noose, there is who can see it and who still cannot, but I think it’s just matter of time.
All the ‘fake’ agreements and discussion in the Vatican was “theatre”, what I see is that everyone is following their agenda, no real talks to find a compromise, no step back. So summing up: no peace in Europe, no improvement on the US-UE side as long as the alliances that tie them can guarantee international balance and leverage over china’s willing in the pacific. Basically events unfold are just escalating and the Alma’s bad scenario seem more likely than it was at the beginning. 
Have a good Sunday
